case_title: DARBELLAY, JULIE A. VS WONG, MEI

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WONG, MEI AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT DARBELLAY, JULIE A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-12-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT WONG, MEI RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT DARBELLAY, JULIE A. $1,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,282.00, CROSS-DEFENDANT WAIVES NO PROOF OF SERVICE. CROSS-DEFENDANT IS 25% RESPONSIBLE FOR THE ACCIDENT AND THE CROSS-COMPLAINANT IS 75% RESPONSIBLE FOR THE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, MEI
DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, $10.00 FEE PAID.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DARBELLAY, JULIE A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, MEI $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,522.00, DEFENDANT WAIVES DEFECTIVE SERVICE. PLAINTIFF IS 25% RESPONSIBLE FOR THE ACCIDENT AND THE DEFT. IS 75% RESPONSIBLE FOR THE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFENDANT'S CLAIM SENT CERT MAIL TO JULIE DARBELLAY-RETURNED-UNCLAIMED.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 28025, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DARBELLAY, JULIE A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WONG, MEI JUDGMENT ORDERED IN FAVOR OF APP/DEFT AND AGAINST RESP/PLTF IN SCA 28025 ON 02/15/06. NO EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY DARBELLAY, JULIE A. AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, MEI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT WONG, MEI
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO MEI WONG, RETURNED TO COURT NO SUCH NUMBER.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-21-2005, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO OCT-12-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT WONG, MEI RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT DARBELLAY, JULIE A. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00, JUDGMENT ORDERED IN FAVOR OF APP/DEFT AND AGAINST RESP/PLTF IN SCA 28025 ON 02/15/06. NO EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. RESPONDENT TO RECOVER NOTHING ON HER CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO PLAINTIFF DARBELLAY, JULIE A.
